title: Design + install fs-touch emitter as harness PostToolUse hook
description: fs-touchd v0.1 ingests FileTouchEventModel JSON files but nothing yet WRITES those events. The natural emission point is a harness PostToolUse hook on Edit/Write/Bash file-mutation tools — captures agent, session, tool, callId, worktask context that fs-watcher (anonymous filesystem watcher) cannot. Per CLAUDE.md / settings.json, hooks are configured by the operator. Design needed: which exact tools to hook, how to detect a file write vs read, where to stage the JSON file before invoking fs-touchd, error handling when fs-touchd is unavailable. Output of this bead: a proposed settings.json hook entry + a small emitter script.
